description1: We create unique handmade products with love and care. From the very beginning, our goal has been to bring a sense of peace and beauty to your homes. Every product we make is crafted with attention to detail and the best materials.
description2: Our team is made up of motivated and creative individuals, each contributing with passion and energy to create products that not only bring you beauty but also enrich your daily life with good feelings and tranquility.
goalDescription: We believe in quality, innovation, and respect for the environment, and we strive to provide you with not just excellent products, but a unique experience using natural materials and sustainable processes.

product.handmade_description: Our candles are 100% handmade and natural.
product.return_policy: Easy return and exchange policy within 7 days.
product.products_description: Our products include a variety of scented and decorative candles that are suitable for any occasion.

b2b_intro: If you’re interested in placing a bulk order for our candles or stoneware (for events, gifts, stores, or B2B collaboration), we’d love to hear from you 💛
b2b_tips_1: Minimum order quantity: starting from 10 pieces (negotiable depending on product).
b2b_tips_2: You can choose between paraffin or soy wax candles with your preferred color and scent.
b2b_tips_3: Stoneware containers are available in a variety of colors.
b2b_tips_4: Preparation time: typically 7-10 business days depending on the design and quantity.
b2b_tips_5: Final pricing depends on quantity, model, material, and delivery time.
b2b_contact_title: 📞 For a price list or consultation, please contact us via one of the following channels:

customerNote.title: Additional Notes
customerNote.description: If you have any special requests about delivery time, packaging, or notes for the seller, please enter them below.

additional_notes_placeholder: If you have any requests about delivery time, courier coordination, or packaging, write them here...

product.bulk_gift_info: For bulk or gift orders, the minimum quantity is 10 candles.
product.products_description:
Handmade candles with unique designs and amazing scents.
Our candles are available in two types of materials:
High-quality paraffin or natural soy wax – the choice is yours!
Candles made with soy wax are slightly more expensive than paraffin due to their natural origin and higher quality.
The color of the candles can be customized to your preference.
Available with pleasant and natural fragrances.
You can order single pieces or in bulk.
Handmade containers made of artificial stone with a unique texture and minimal design – perfect for home décor or as a gift.
Available in your desired color.
Offered both individually and in bulk.
Preparation time: 7 to 10 working days.

terms.intro: Dear user, please read the following terms carefully before using Respect’s services. Entering the website respects.ir and using any of its features means you are aware of and accept all the rules and terms. Registering any order also implies full acceptance of these terms.
terms.section1_desc: According to e-commerce law, the following definitions are used throughout this document:
terms.section1_1: 1.1 – Store: The online store respects.ir acting as the seller.
terms.section1_2: 1.2 – Website: The Respect online store available at www.respects.ir.
terms.section1_3: 1.3 – Website content: All information such as prices, texts, images, videos, product specifications, and articles posted on the website.
terms.section1_4: 1.4 – Guest user: Any individual visiting the website via the Internet.
terms.section1_5: 1.5 – Member: Any person who registers on the website with verifiable identity information.
terms.section1_6: 1.6 – Customer: A user or member who purchases from the website.
terms.section1_7: 1.7 – Order: The item(s) selected and submitted by the customer for purchase.
terms.section2_desc: Online purchases are considered legal contracts. Placing any order means you have read and accepted these terms in full.
terms.section3_desc: When you use respects.ir services, communication occurs electronically, and you agree to receive messages via email or SMS. The email and phone number registered in your profile are the only official contact points. For marketing updates or promotions, respects.ir may send messages, which you can cancel by replying 'off'. The only official contact domain is www.respects.ir.
terms.section4_desc: Users can view and order products without registration, but creating an account simplifies future purchases and allows you to receive offers. Respect guarantees that all personal information will remain secure and only be used for communication purposes.
terms.section4_extra: This document supersedes all previous terms and agreements.
gifts.intro_text: 🎁 We accept custom gift and candle orders! Looking for a unique, personalized gift with your own style? You’re in the right place. Get inspired by our presets or order your own color, design and text.
gifts.how_1: Contact us via the available channels.
gifts.how_2: Send a reference photo/sample if you have one.
gifts.how_3: Tell us your preferred color, design and text (font/style if needed).
gifts.how_4: Specify quantity and your desired delivery date.
gifts.ideas_1: Browse our ready gift sets to get inspired.
gifts.ideas_2: If you have an event theme (color palette, logo, wedding, birthday, corporate), share it and we’ll suggest the best combo.
gifts.ideas_3: Want special vessels or packaging? Describe it and we’ll review and send similar options.
gifts.custom_3: Text or logo on candle / gift tag
gifts.custom_5: Sizes and quantities in gift packs
gifts.important_1: Custom work takes time; allow at least 7–14 business days (may vary by volume/complexity).
gifts.important_2: For large orders (20+ items) or tight deadlines, contact earlier.
gifts.important_3: Changes after final approval may add time/cost.
gifts.price_1: Pricing depends on size, embellishments, packaging and quantity. For an exact quote, send: model + qty + packaging.
gifts.price_2: Minimum order is usually 5+ items (varies by model).
gifts.price_3: Payment: bank transfer or online payment (details after coordination).
gifts.delivery_1: Gifts are packaged nicely, with option for a custom greeting card.
gifts.delivery_2: Shipping via post/courier is available — shipping cost is separate.
gifts.delivery_3: Express shipping or local pickup may be arranged where possible.
gifts.consult_text: Not sure what fits your event or gift? Send venue photos, color theme or style and we’ll suggest practical options.
gifts.cancel_1: Major changes after final approval may not be possible or may incur extra cost.
gifts.cancel_2: If canceled after production starts, part of the fee will be deducted for materials and labor.
